name: openclaw-devboxes-skill
description: Dev container lifecycle management via OpenClaw. Create, start, stop, and list web-accessible dev environments with VSCode Web, noVNC desktop, Chromium CDP, Traefik/Cloudflare Tunnel routing. Two-phase startup architecture with main/subagent separation.
review: Sophisticated, well-designed infrastructure skill for web-accessible dev environments from chat. Novel capability — no equivalent exists in the marketplace. Covers VSCode Web, noVNC, Chromium CDP, and dual routing modes (Traefik/Cloudflare Tunnel). Docker socket access clearly documented with sandbox mode enforcement.
